seoTitle: Cardwell vs Carina Heights — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Cardwell and Carina Heights. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Cardwell vs Carina Heights: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cardwell and Carina Heights.
heading: Cardwell vs Carina Heights — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cardwell, Queensland and Carina Heights, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cardwell has a lower overall climate risk score (25/100) compared to Carina Heights (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cardwell or Carina Heights safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cardwell has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Carina Heights scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cardwell scores 30/100 for bushfire risk. Carina Heights scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cardwell or Carina Heights?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cardwell has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
